## What changed

Describe the change in 2-5 bullets.

## Why

Explain the motivation and user impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] No breaking change, or clearly documented
